welcome.name: Welcome — New Customer Onboarding
welcome.description: Onboards new customers to the NetWebMedia platform (46 modules, 7 hubs). Sequence walks from account-live, to first 10-minute win, to AI Agents + Agency tier upsell.

preview.en: 7 hubs, 46 modules, one login — start here
preview.es: 7 hubs, 46 módulos, un login — empieza aquí

subject.en: Your 10-minute first win on the platform

preview.en: Contacts + Pipeline + Automations, done in ten

audit_followup.name: Free Audit Request — Follow-up
audit_followup.description: Diagnostic-tone follow-up for prospects who requested a free audit. References canonical modules (Automations, Conversations, Content AI) to seed product awareness.

subject.en: Audit request received — here's the timeline

preview.es: Tu roadmap de 90 días llega en 48 horas

preview.en: 3 quick wins + 90-day plan on our modules

preview.en: Open invitation: 30-min strategy call, no pressure
preview.es: Invitación abierta: llamada de 30 min, sin presión

partner_application.name: Agency Partner Recruiting
partner_application.description: Hard-sell the Agency/Partner tier: Sub-accounts, White-label, Stripe Connect billing, Affiliates, Reputation. Positioning: keep 100% of the client AND 100% of the markup. Partner-1 cold pitch, Partner-2 case study, Partner-3 founder pricing CTA.

subject.en: Keep 100% of the client AND 100% of the markup
subject.es: Quédate con 100% del cliente Y 100% del markup

preview.en: Sub-accounts, white-label, Stripe Connect — all in
preview.es: Sub-cuentas, white-label, Stripe Connect — todo adentro

subject.en: How one partner hit $34k/mo net in 90 days
subject.es: Cómo un partner llegó a $34k/mes neto en 90 días

preview.en: The exact playbook on our Agency tier
preview.es: El playbook exacto sobre el tier Agencia

preview.en: 6 founder slots left — lifetime price lock
preview.es: Quedan 6 cupos fundadores — precio bloqueado de por vida

re_engagement.name: Re-engagement — Dormant Lead
re_engagement.description: For dormant leads (30d+ no opens). Reintroduces the platform after shipping 30+ new modules (AI Agents hub, Agency tier, Service hub, CMS hub). Drives to /nwm-crm or /pricing.

subject.en: We've shipped 30+ new modules since you checked
subject.es: Lanzamos 30+ módulos nuevos desde la última vez

preview.en: AI Agents, Agency tier, Service hub, CMS hub
preview.es: Agentes IA, tier Agencia, hub Servicio, hub CMS

subject.en: Last note — one more reason to stay
subject.es: Última nota — una razón más para quedarte

preview.en: AI Agents + Agency tier are the headline
preview.es: Agentes IA + tier Agencia son lo grande

winback.name: Win-back — Cancelled Customer
winback.description: For churned customers. Winback-1 asks why they left and offers a free 30-day Agency plan trial if they're an agency. Winback-2 recaps the 46-module expansion, AI Agents, and offers COMEBACK30 discount.

preview.en: Honest feedback wanted — free Agency trial if you're an agency
preview.es: Feedback honesto — trial gratis de Agencia si eres agencia

subject.en: The platform tripled since you left, {{first_name|there}}
subject.es: La plataforma triplicó desde que te fuiste

preview.en: 46 modules, AI Agents, Agency tier — and 30% off to return
preview.es: 46 módulos, Agentes IA, tier Agencia — y 30% off para volver
